case_title: DAVID BARTEL VS. STANFORD FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN HENRY--COMMERCIAL BANKING OFFICER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARTEL, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STANFORD FEDERAL CREDIT UNION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-07-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
